prompt_text:
### Demographics: 72-year-old Asian woman

### Visit type: Follow-up visit (12-month follow-up)

### Reason for visit / current symptoms
Reason for visit: Routine follow-up (every 3 months) | Diagnosis context: 14 years ago Diagnosed with type 2 diabetes after preoperative labs showed elevated HbA1c
Current symptoms: Postprandial fatigue and thirst noted; no DKA/HHS signs; no recent hypoglycemia

### History
- Other conditions: Chronic kidney disease Stage 3a (45-59)
Cirrhosis
Body mass index category: Overweight
Diabetic retinopathy
Diabetic neuropathy
Diabetic Retinopathy
Diabetic Peripheral Neuropathy
Diabetic Foot Ulcer / High-Risk Foot
Thyroid nodule (status post lobectomy)
Cataract (status post surgery)
- Diabetes-related comorbidities: CKD: Stage 3a (45-59); HF (No); ASCVD (No); MASLD: Cirrhosis; BMI Category: Overweight
- Family history: No family history of type 2 diabetes (elicited)
- Social history: Never smoker; Alcohol 5-6 drinks/week (1-2 per sitting)

### Medication information
- Current medications: Metformin 1000mg twice daily; Empagliflozin 10mg once daily; Insulin Degludec 15units once daily; Rosuvastatin (10 mg daily), Lisinopril (10 mg daily)

### Physical exam (current)
Weight 55.7 kg; Height 150.8 cm; BMI 24.5 kg/m²; Blood pressure 144/86 mmHg

### Laboratory values (with date / relative timing)
Format: YYYY-MM-DD value or relative timing (12 months ago / 9 months ago / 6 months ago / 3 months ago / current)
Order: 12 months ago -> 9 months ago -> 6 months ago -> 3 months ago -> current
- Glycemia: HbA1c (12 months ago 9.7%; 9 months ago 9.5%; 6 months ago 9.5%; 3 months ago 9.6%; current 9.9%), FPG (12 months ago 209mg/dL; 9 months ago 203mg/dL; 6 months ago 203mg/dL; 3 months ago 261mg/dL; current 228mg/dL)
- Anthropometrics / blood pressure: Weight (12 months ago 53.3kg; 9 months ago 55.3kg; 6 months ago 53.9kg; 3 months ago 54.9kg; current 55.7kg), Height (12 months ago 150.8cm; 9 months ago 150.8cm; 6 months ago 150.8cm; 3 months ago 150.8cm; current 150.8cm), BMI (12 months ago 24.0kg/m²; 9 months ago 24.0kg/m²; 6 months ago 24.0kg/m²; 3 months ago 24.0kg/m²; current 24.5kg/m²), SBP (12 months ago 147mmHg; 9 months ago 142mmHg; 6 months ago 147mmHg; 3 months ago 142mmHg; current 144mmHg), DBP (12 months ago 84mmHg; 9 months ago 83mmHg; 6 months ago 84mmHg; 3 months ago 83mmHg; current 86mmHg)
- Liver function: ALT (12 months ago 41U/L; 9 months ago 40U/L; 6 months ago 40U/L; 3 months ago 40U/L; current 43U/L), AST (12 months ago 58U/L; 9 months ago 59U/L; 6 months ago 59U/L; 3 months ago 61U/L; current 55U/L), Total Bilirubin (12 months ago 1.9mg/dL; 9 months ago 1.9mg/dL; 6 months ago 1.8mg/dL; 3 months ago 1.8mg/dL; current 1.7mg/dL)
- Kidney: eGFR (12 months ago 53mL/min/1.73m²; 9 months ago 49mL/min/1.73m²; 6 months ago 51mL/min/1.73m²; 3 months ago 48mL/min/1.73m²; current 49mL/min/1.73m²), UACR (12 months ago 137mg/g; 9 months ago 103mg/g; 6 months ago 158mg/g; 3 months ago 126mg/g; current 145mg/g)
- Lipids: LDL (12 months ago 85mg/dL; 9 months ago 84mg/dL; 6 months ago 84mg/dL; 3 months ago 80mg/dL; current 82mg/dL); HDL (12 months ago 44mg/dL; 9 months ago 40mg/dL; 6 months ago 41mg/dL; 3 months ago 40mg/dL; current 42mg/dL); Triglycerides (12 months ago 105mg/dL; 9 months ago 101mg/dL; 6 months ago 102mg/dL; 3 months ago 124mg/dL; current 112mg/dL)
- Hemoglobin: Hemoglobin (12 months ago 12.0g/dL; 9 months ago 11.2g/dL; 6 months ago 11.9g/dL; 3 months ago 11.2g/dL; current 11.6g/dL)
- Additional tests: urine ketone Not measured (Current); fasting C-peptide Not measured (Current)

### Individualized treatment decision factors
Current adherence and self-management: Moderate adherence (estimated 70-90%); SMBG 1-3 times/week; lifestyle control inconsistent.
Financial context: Patient has standard insurance with moderate copays and a monthly medication budget of ≤ KRW 500,000.
